_comment: SOURCE catalog (input to build/generate.py). Defines the Claude Code marketplace name, shared owner/metadata, and which skills compose which plugins. 'plugin' is a Claude-only grouping: other tools (cursor/copilot/agents) flatten to one file per skill and ignore this file. Skill names are the directory names under skills/. Regenerate after editing: python build/generate.py
name: tensorleap

plugins.name: tensorleap
plugins.description: Tensorleap's AI-assistant skills for authoring and debugging Tensorleap integrations.
